     The Numbers Business Report

Bottoms (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $12,036,071Details
International Box Office $937,411
Worldwide Box Office $12,973,482
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Two girls, PJ and Josie, start a fight club as a way to lose their virginities to cheerleaders. Their bizarre plan works. The fight club gains traction and soon the most popular girls in school are beating each other up in the name of self-defense. But PJ and Josie find themselves in over their heads and in need of a way out before their plan is exposed.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$461,052 (3.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.95 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:92.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$11,300,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:10 opening theaters/1,815 max. theaters, 2.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $13,158,260

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 25th, 2023 (Limited) by MGM
September 1st, 2023 (Expands Wide) by MGM
International Releases: November 3rd, 2023 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
November 30th, 2023 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: September 22nd, 2023 by Prime Video
MPA Rating: R for crude sexual content, pervasive language and some violence.
(Rating bulletin 2753 (cert #54079), 10/12/2022)
Running Time: 91 minutes
Plot point: Cheerleaders, Underground / Illegal Fighting
Social setting: High School
Subgenre: Sex Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Orion Pictures, Brownstone
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

The fight club gains traction and soon the most popular girls in school are beating each other up in the name of self-defense. But PJ and Josie find themselves in over their heads and in need of a way out before their plan is exposed.
